svg.aria-label: npm registry large-scale supply chain breach, 18 core packages including debug chalk lodash infected with malware, weekly download volume above 2 billion, emergency triage and SBOM-based recovery procedure.
svg.title: 2025-09-10: npm 2.0 breach, 18 core packages, 2B weekly downloads

g.text: Maintainer ATO via phishing : malware injected...
Maintainer ATO chain : npm publish hijack : transitive...
OTP backup code abuse : phishing landing page : staged...
Env var sweep : .env / AWS_SECRET : NPM_TOKEN steal
Block npm postinstall in CI : audit .npmrc tokens : rotate...
Scan deps with osv-scanner + snyk : disable postinstall :...
